general_inquiry.question: Find the roots of the following polynomial: $3 \sqrt{3} x^2+\frac{13 x}{\sqrt{3}}-\frac{17}{\sqrt{3}}$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The roots of the polynomial \(3 \sqrt{3} x^2 + \frac{13 x}{\sqrt{3}} - \frac{17}{\sqrt{3}}\) are:

\[ x = \frac{1}{3} \]
and 
\[ x = -\frac{17}{3} \]
